title: Propose ADR 0004 for Worker snapshot and read model encoding
summary: Produce the proposed Worker Snapshot encoding ADR for M1 render snapshots, UI detail, metrics and headless/Worker hash parity without moving authority to UI.
acceptance: ADR-0004 is created with Status Proposed and covers alternatives, migration, rollback, test and performance implications
Snapshot/read-model ownership keeps Simulation Worker authoritative and UI read-only
Encoding records versioning, sequence handling, backpressure, metrics fields and stale result rejection
Worker and Node parity tests required by later tasks are specified

history.details: Proposed ADR-0004 for M1 Worker snapshot/read-model encoding; required checks pass

verified: No blocking findings; ADR-0004 remains Proposed, covers alternatives/migration/rollback/tests/performance, preserves Worker/Node authority with read-only UI projections, specifies versioning/sequences/backpressure/metrics/stale rejection and parity tests, and introduces no protocol implementation/runtime dependency/UI mutation authority/SAB requirement/deployment change.
